name: Global Streets
description: National network of 13 partners co-creating and presenting international outdoor arts events with communities in underserved places across England. Since 2015: 400+ performances, 1M+ audience members, 124,500+ participants.

name: Festival of Thrift
description: Partner of Global Streets national outdoor arts network. Global Streets brings free, spectacular, international outdoor arts productions to underserved communities across England.
